requirement_topic.en: EMC requirements — IS/IEC 61000 series applicability for industrial motors in India
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 要求 — IS/IEC 61000 系列在印度工业电机中的适用性
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 要求 — IS/IEC 61000 系列在印度工業電機中的適用性

summary.en: India adopts IEC 61000 series standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) through the IS/IEC designation. However, as of the information available through the training knowledge cutoff, there is no standalone mandatory EMC certification requirement specifically for industrial three-phase induction motors in India comparable to the EU's EMC Directive. The BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) under the Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Order applies primarily to electronics and IT equipment — bare industrial motors are not typically in CRS scope. Purchasers and system integrators in India may impose contractual EMC requirements referencing IS/IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic currents) and IS/IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations) for variable-speed drive systems. NOTE: Verify current CRS scope and any updated Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) or BIS notifications — regulatory scope evolves and this area has uncertainty.
summary.zh: 印度通过 IS/IEC 标号采用 IEC 61000 系列电磁兼容（EMC）标准。然而，据截至知识截止日的可用信息，印度对工业三相感应电机尚无可与欧盟 EMC 指令相类比的独立强制性 EMC 认证要求。电子和信息技术商品强制注册令下的 BIS 强制注册计划（CRS）主要适用于电子和信息技术设备——裸工业电机通常不在 CRS 适用范围内。印度买方和系统集成商可能通过合同要求变频驱动系统参照 IS/IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流）和 IS/IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动）。注意：请核实当前 CRS 适用范围及电子和信息技术部（MeitY）或 BIS 的最新通知——监管范围持续演进，此领域存在不确定性。
summary.zht: 印度通過 IS/IEC 標號採用 IEC 61000 系列電磁相容（EMC）標準。然而，據截至知識截止日的可用信息，印度對工業三相感應電機尚無可與歐盟 EMC 指令相類比的獨立強制性 EMC 認證要求。電子和信息技術商品強制註冊令下的 BIS 強制註冊計劃（CRS）主要適用於電子和信息技術設備——裸工業電機通常不在 CRS 適用範圍內。印度買方和系統集成商可能通過合同要求變頻驅動系統參照 IS/IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流）和 IS/IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動）。注意：請核實當前 CRS 適用範圍及電子和信息技術部（MeitY）或 BIS 的最新通知——監管範圍持續演進，此領域存在不確定性。

standards_or_laws: IS/IEC 61000-3-2 (Limits for harmonic current emissions — equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Order (CRS scope — primarily IT/electronics, not bare motors)

summary.en: China does not impose mandatory EMC certification specifically on bare industrial three-phase induction motors — CCC (China Compulsory Certification) does not cover this product category. GB/T 7588 and other standards apply to specific equipment incorporating motors (e.g., lifts). Motor manufacturers may voluntarily test to GB/T 17626 series (harmonised with IEC 61000 for immunity testing). The situation in both China and India for bare motors is that EMC requirements attach at the system (machine/installation) level rather than the motor component level.
summary.zh: 中国对裸工业三相感应电机不强制要求 EMC 认证——CCC（中国强制认证）不覆盖此类产品。GB/T 7588 等标准适用于含电机的特定设备（如电梯）。电机制造商可自愿按 GB/T 17626 系列（与 IEC 61000 抗扰度测试协调）进行测试。中印两国对裸电机的 EMC 要求，通常在系统（机械/装置）层面而非电机元件层面附加。
summary.zht: 中國對裸工業三相感應電機不強制要求 EMC 認證——CCC（中國強制認證）不覆蓋此類產品。GB/T 7588 等標準適用於含電機的特定設備（如電梯）。電機製造商可自願按 GB/T 17626 系列（與 IEC 61000 抗擾度測試協調）進行測試。中印兩國對裸電機的 EMC 要求，通常在系統（機械/裝置）層面而非電機元件層面附加。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (IEC 61000 equivalent, voluntary for bare motors)
China CCC — not applicable to bare industrial motors

gap.en: For bare three-phase induction motors, the EMC regulatory gap between China and India appears low as of available information — neither market imposes a mandatory standalone EMC certification on this product category. However, this may change as BIS updates its CRS product list. The practical gap lies at the system level: if the motor is sold as part of a motor-drive system or machinery, the integrating machinery may be subject to EMC requirements under Indian regulations or buyer specifications. Exporters should confirm current CRS scope from BIS official notifications before shipment.
gap.zh: 就裸三相感应电机而言，据现有信息，中印两国 EMC 监管差距较小——两国均未对此类产品强制要求独立的 EMC 认证。但随着 BIS 更新 CRS 产品清单，这一状况可能改变。实际差距在系统层面：若电机作为电机驱动系统或机械设备的一部分销售，集成机械设备可能须遵守印度法规或买方规范的 EMC 要求。出口商在出货前应向 BIS 官方通知核实当前 CRS 适用范围。
gap.zht: 就裸三相感應電機而言，據現有信息，中印兩國 EMC 監管差距較小——兩國均未對此類產品強制要求獨立的 EMC 認證。但隨著 BIS 更新 CRS 產品清單，這一狀況可能改變。實際差距在系統層面：若電機作為電機驅動系統或機械設備的一部分銷售，集成機械設備可能須遵守印度法規或買方規範的 EMC 要求。出口商在出貨前應向 BIS 官方通知核實當前 CRS 適用範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory for bare motors as of available information — CRS applies to IT/electronics; verify current BIS notifications
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for bare industrial motors — CCC does not cover this category

compliance_verdict.en: No mandatory standalone EMC certification appears required for bare three-phase induction motors in India based on available information. However, exporters must verify this against current BIS CRS product lists and any Ministry of Power or MeitY notifications, as regulatory scope evolves. If motors are integrated into drive systems or machinery, EMC compliance at the system level should be verified. This row carries higher-than-usual uncertainty — treat as indicative only.
compliance_verdict.zh: 据现有信息，印度对裸三相感应电机似乎不要求独立的强制性 EMC 认证。但出口商须参照当前 BIS CRS 产品清单及电力部或 MeitY 的任何通知进行核实，因为监管范围持续演进。若电机集成至驱动系统或机械设备，应核验系统层面的 EMC 合规性。此条目的不确定性高于一般水平——仅作参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: 據現有信息，印度對裸三相感應電機似乎不要求獨立的強制性 EMC 認證。但出口商須參照當前 BIS CRS 產品清單及電力部或 MeitY 的任何通知進行核實，因為監管範圍持續演進。若電機集成至驅動系統或機械設備，應核驗系統層面的 EMC 合規性。此條目的不確定性高於一般水準——僅作參考。
